# Expected files after /github-workflow runs
#
# /github-workflow is an EXPLICIT-invocation, external-write skill — it connects
# idea-to-deploy state to GitHub (Issues, PRs, CI, releases).
#
# May produce (only when relevant / approved):
#   .itd-integrations/github.json   — export payload when live sync is
#                                     unavailable or not approved
#   BRANCH_FINISH.md (project root) — when branch-finish is in scope
#   .rubric-status (update)         — reconciled with CI / PR status
#
# Live GitHub mutations (issue create, PR open, push, merge, close, release)
# happen ONLY on explicit user intent — and they are external, not files.
#
# /github-workflow MUST NOT:
#   - push / merge / close issues / resolve review threads / cut prod releases
#     without explicit user intent
#   - hide a failing CI run behind a documentation-only status
#   - mark branch work finished without fresh verification + BRANCH_FINISH.md
#
# /github-workflow MAY:
#   - read local git status before any mutation
#   - inspect PR / CI / review state via the GitHub connector or `gh`
#   - map findings back to idea-to-deploy artifacts (BACKLOG.md, .rubric-status)
#   - print the output shape (GITHUB TARGET / ARTIFACTS UPDATED / CHECK STATUS /
#     ACTION TAKEN / BLOCKERS / NEXT ACTION)
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor
# (external GitHub access + stdout). Manual verification via notes.md.
